allow: Bash(head -20 echo "---" grep -n "coming soon\\|under construction\\|placeholder\\|TODO\\|todo\\|not yet\\|work in progress\\|WIP" /var/www/cortexbuild-ultimate/src/components/modules/Projects.tsx)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE USER cortexbuild WITH PASSWORD 'CortexBuild2024!' CREATEDB;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "CREATE DATABASE cortexbuild OWNER cortexbuild;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d cortexbuild -c "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO cortexbuild; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA public TO cortexbuild;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT email, role FROM users LIMIT 5;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT email, LEFT\(password_hash, 10\) as hash_prefix FROM users;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT email, password_hash FROM users;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD='CortexBuild2024!' psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U cortexbuild -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT id, name FROM projects;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT id, name FROM projects;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD='CortexBuild2024!' psql -U cortexbuild -h 127.0.0.1 -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM users;" 2>&1)
Bash(sudo -u postgres psql -c "ALTER SYSTEM SET log_connections = on; ALTER SYSTEM SET log_min_messages = ''''debug5'''';")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Login:'''', d[''''user''''][''''name''''], ''''|'''', d[''''user''''][''''role'''']\)")

Bash(sed -i -e "s/bg-green-100 text-green-70[78]/bg-green-500\\/20 text-green-300/g" -e "s/bg-green-100 text-green-80[0-9]/bg-green-500\\/20 text-green-300/g" -e "s/bg-blue-100 text-blue-70[78]/bg-blue-500\\/20 text-blue-300/g" -e "s/bg-blue-100 text-blue-80[0-9]/bg-blue-500\\/20 text-blue-300/g" -e "s/bg-red-100 text-red-70[78]/bg-red-500\\/20 text-red-300/g" -e "s/bg-red-100 text-red-80[0-9]/bg-red-500\\/20 text-red-300/g" -e "s/bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-70[78]/bg-yellow-500\\/20 text-yellow-300/g" -e "s/bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-80[0-9]/bg-yellow-500\\/20 text-yellow-300/g" -e "s/bg-orange-100 text-orange-70[78]/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-300/g" -e "s/bg-orange-100 text-orange-80[0-9]/bg-orange-500\\/20 text-orange-300/g" -e "s/bg-purple-100 text-purple-70[78]/bg-purple-500\\/20 text-purple-300/g" -e "s/bg-purple-100 text-purple-80[0-9]/bg-purple-500\\/20 text-purple-300/g" "$f")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=CortexBuild2024! psql -U cortexbuild -h 127.0.0.1 -d cortexbuild -c "
SELECT 
  relname AS table,
  n_live_tup AS rows
FROM pg_stat_user_tables
ORDER BY n_live_tup DESC;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=CortexBuild2024! psql -U cortexbuild -h 127.0.0.1 -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT name, email, role FROM users;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=CortexBuild2024! psql -U cortexbuild -h 127.0.0.1 -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT name, email, left\(password_hash,10\) as hash_prefix FROM users;" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''✓ API online:'''', d.get\(''''message'''',''''OK''''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''token:'''', ''''YES'''' if d.get\(''''token''''\) else d.get\(''''message''''\)\)" 2)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=CortexBuild2024! psql -U cortexbuild -h 127.0.0.1 -d cortexbuild -c "SELECT id, name FROM projects ORDER BY created_at;" 2>&1)
